title: podman pull  nginx@sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555 fails
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->
`podman pull nginx` succeeds but the following podman pull fails.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. `podman pull  nginx@sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555`

**Describe the results you received:**
```
$ podman pull  nginx@sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555
Trying to pull docker.io/library/nginx@sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555...ERRO[0001] Error pulling image ref //nginx@sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555: Digest of source image's manifest would not match destination reference
Failed
Error: error pulling image "nginx@sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555": unable to pull nginx@sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555: 1 error occurred:
        * Digest of source image's manifest would not match destination reference
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
The following is the output using docker
```
$ docker pull  nginx@sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555
sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555: Pulling from library/nginx
e7c96db7181b: Pull complete
264026bbe255: Pull complete
a71634c55d29: Pull complete
5595887beb81: Pull complete
Digest: sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555
Status: Downloaded newer image for nginx@sha256:57a226fb6ab6823027c0704a9346a890ffb0cacde06bc19bbc234c8720673555
```

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
Version:            1.3.2-dev
RemoteAPI Version:  1
Go Version:         go1.10.4
OS/Arch:            linux/amd64
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

```
debug:
  compiler: gc
  git commit: ""
  go version: go1.10.4
  podman version: 1.3.2-dev
host:
  BuildahVersion: 1.9.0-dev
  Conmon:
    package: 'conmon: /usr/libexec/crio/conmon'
    path: /usr/libexec/crio/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 0.2.0, commit: '
  Distribution:
    distribution: ubuntu
    version: "18.04"
  MemFree: 5777891328
  MemTotal: 17057861632
  OCIRuntime:
    package: 'cri-o-runc: /usr/bin/runc'
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: 'runc version spec: 1.0.1-dev'
  SwapFree: 51205361664
  SwapTotal: 51539607552
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 8
  hostname: DESKTOP-BG5LGLR
  kernel: 4.4.0-17134-Microsoft
  os: linux
  rootless: false
  uptime: 98h 34m 23.48s (Approximately 4.08 days)
registries:
  blocked: null
  insecure: null
  search:
  - docker.io
store:
  ConfigFile: /etc/containers/storage.conf
  ContainerStore:
    number: 0
  GraphDriverName: overlay
  GraphOptions: null
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: <unknown>
    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "false"
  ImageStore:
    number: 2

  VolumePath: /var/lib/containers/storage/volumes
```

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**
Windows 10 WSL Ubuntu

comments.body:
@mtrmac PTAL - seems like this is coming out of c/image?

WSL may be involved here, but not certain how. @kkimdev are you on the new version of WSL, that uses a VM as opposed to emulating syscalls? I don't know if we can expect proper behavior on the older versions of WSL.

@mheon btw, do you mind quickly testing the above pull command?  I'm not sure if it's WSL specific or not, since I can do `podman pull nginx` just fine.

And no, my WSL is the version that emulating syscalls. I believe that new WSL 2 is not released yet https://devblogs.microsoft.com/commandline/announcing-wsl-2/

`* Digest of source image's manifest would not match destination reference`

Same error, 1.2.0 in Fedora packaged Podman

Yeah, https://github.com/cri-o/cri-o/issues/2157#issuecomment-475423356 . I don’t quite know how to deal with this well. I suppose doing what Docker does, and recording the digests but not verifying them at any point, is the best we can realistically do, but by now it’s likely enough to break someone.
@mtrmac @kkimdev Do we still have this issue?
This issue had no activity for 30 days. In the absence of activity or the "do-not-close" label, the issue will be automatically closed within 7 days.
I've added the do-not-close label.  Looks to be around still in 1.6.2 anyway.
Yeah, this would have been fixed by #4310, but that was after 1.6.2.
Since this is fixed in 1.6.3 closing.
I'm on Fedora 31 and podman 1.6.2 is still the latest and I'm hitting this issue.
v1.7.0 has been released and should be in updates/testing either now, or very soon.

I still see 1.6.2. This is pretty urgent. Trying to resolve a hot issue for a customer. Do I need to build from source to get 1.6.3 on Fedora 31?

sudo dnf --enablerepo=updates-testing list podman*
Last metadata expiration check: 0:01:31 ago on Wed 08 Jan 2020 03:21:41 PM EST.
